## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential SEO strategies and collaboration between School AI and fwd.digital, focusing on editorial and programmatic content approaches.](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [School AI is transitioning from Webflow to Framer for their website, aiming for faster campaign deployment and potential self-serve motion](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [fwd.digital can assist with both editorial and programmatic content strategies, with a focus on rapid seed planting and scaling successful content](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [School AI's market presents a unique opportunity due to limited sophisticated competition, allowing for potentially faster ranking](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Website Platform Transition

  - [Moving from Webflow to Framer for faster campaign deployment](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Need to verify Framer's capability to handle 20,000+ pages](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Importance of API access and negotiating enterprise-level pricing](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Potential need for dedicated dev resource for marketing website](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### SEO Strategy Overview

  - [Two-pronged approach: Editorial and Programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Editorial: Starts with competitive gap analysis and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Programmatic: Focuses on scaling successful content themes rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Importance of continuous content refreshing and value addition](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

### Editorial Content Strategy

  - [Develop comprehensive content plan (e.g., 3,400 assignments for Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Stack-rank assignments based on keyword difficulty and business relevance](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Start publishing quickly (by second week) to test and learn](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Double down on successful content themes](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Programmatic Content Approach

  - [Build on validated content lanes from editorial success](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Focus on unique information sources and rigorous quality control](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Dedicate resources to continuous content creation and improvement](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Aim for constant value addition to maintain rankings](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

### Case Study: Steadily

  - [Grew organic traffic from 20k to 150k monthly visits in 6-7 months](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [Utilized both editorial and programmatic approaches](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Created content clusters (e.g., state-specific articles) for scalable content](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Prioritized high CTR content for scaling](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

### School AI's Current Situation

  - [Starting from scratch with marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [No existing SEO tools or analytics setup](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Opportunity to align tool selection with fwd.digital's preferred stack](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Colton to verify Framer's capability for handling large-scale content and negotiate enterprise pricing](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Marcel to send follow-up with two options: editorial first then programmatic, or start both simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Marcel to provide potential kickoff dates (targeting end of October)](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Colton to review cost proposals from fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to finalize strategy and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/RsgyTVz9MkPmzgZnx7CEJxvnwyJxxRgK?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
